result.summary: The page is functional and generally well-structured, but features minor visual clutter and scaling issues in the header.

issues.description: The header area is highly cluttered, with the secondary Rivers Casino logo being too small to be legible.
issues.suggestion: Simplify the header logos or increase the spacing and size of the secondary logo for better clarity.

issues.description: The horizontal carousel design cuts off game tiles on the right edge without a clear visual indicator like a scroll arrow.
issues.suggestion: Add a subtle fade effect or scroll arrow indicator to make the horizontal scroll capability more intuitive.
